title: hieracium lazistanum subsp. velenovskyanum
intro: Hieracium lazistanum subsp. velenovskyanum is a sub-species of the Hieracium plant, commonly known as Hawkweed or False Hawkweed, characterized by its small yellow flowers and growth habits. The medicinal properties of Hieracium lazistanum subsp. velenovskyanum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Hieracium lazistanum subsp. velenovskyanum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
